name: Palo Alto WildFire
description: Palo Alto Networks WildFire cloud-based malware analysis sandbox providing automated file and URL detonation, verdict assignment, and detailed behavioral analysis reports

actions.name: Submit File
actions.description: Submit a file to WildFire for sandbox analysis and malware verdict determination

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to submit for analysis (multipart form data)

actions.name: Submit URL
actions.description: Submit a URL to WildFire for website or file-URL analysis

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to submit (must start with http:// or https://)

actions.name: Submit Links
actions.description: Submit a web page link for WildFire analysis (specifically for web page behavior analysis)

actions.name: Get Verdict
actions.description: Get the WildFire verdict for a sample by its hash (0=benign, 1=malware, 2=grayware, 4=phishing, 5=C2, -100=pending, -101=error, -102=unknown, -103=invalid)

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 or SHA256 hash of the sample

actions.name: Get Verdicts (Bulk)
actions.description: Get WildFire verdicts for up to 500 hashes in a single request

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Text file containing one hash per line (up to 500 MD5 or SHA256 hashes)

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Retrieve the full WildFire analysis report for a sample in XML or PDF format

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 or SHA256 hash of the sample

actions.name: Get Sample
actions.description: Download the original sample file from WildFire by hash

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 or SHA256 hash of the sample to download

actions.name: Get PCAP
actions.description: Download the packet capture (PCAP) file from the sandbox analysis

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 or SHA256 hash of the sample

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Platform of the analysis (e.g., Windows XP, Windows 7, Android APK)

actions.name: Get URL Verdict
actions.description: Get the WildFire verdict for a specific URL

actions.name: Get Changed Verdicts
actions.description: Retrieve a list of verdicts that changed within the last 30 days

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Start date for changed verdicts (YYYY-MM-DD format, within last 30 days)
